/usr/bin/ar cr ../../lib/libcif.a  CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifbinread.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifclose.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifdata.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifdup.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/ciferrstr.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/ciffiledir.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/ciffree.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifgetpos.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifgetrec.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifmode.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifmsg.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifopen.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifprint.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifputrec.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifrecgroup.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifrel.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifsetpos.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifspace.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cifunitdir.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cif_conv.c.o CMakeFiles/cif.dir/cif_lines.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libcif.a
